name: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names
notes: This Building Block triggers when a cryptocurrency mining threat name is detected.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
when the event matches Threat Name (custom) is not N/A
when any of Threat Name (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
AND when the event matches Threat Name (custom) is not N/A
AND when any of Threat Name (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
